name: Cisco Systems
analysis: CSCO has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at $117.9292. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at $119.7909 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry $117.9292, stop $112.4343, target $120.7900. Risk/reward is 0.52:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
